title: Peter Steinberger｜I always wanted a GitHub dashboard: See my repos, open Issues/PRs, what version I released
full_text: I always wanted a GitHub dashboard: See my repos, open Issues/PRs, what version I released last, how many commits since last release. So I built one for everyone. https://t.co/GWCP5wcrDQ https://t.co/DRvjenlVMi Polyagentmorous ClawFather. Came back from retirement to mess with AI and help a lobster take over the world. @OpenClaw🦞 + @OpenAI likes=676; retweets=43; replies=58
